MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-13-2021 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LARISA SHILOVA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED IN PART & GRANTED IN PART THE APPLICATION. THE COURT PARTIALLY GRANTED THE WAIVER AS TO THE FIRST APPEARANCE FILING FEE ONLY AND APPLICANT MUST PAY ALL OTHER COURT FEES AND COSTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210012923)
